resources.string: Eggs (3 pcs), milk (50 ml), butter (15 g), salt, fresh herbs (parsley or dill).

1. Crack eggs into a bowl, add milk and a pinch of salt.
2. Whisk thoroughly with a fork until smooth.
3. Heat a pan and melt the butter.
4. Pour in the egg mixture. Cook on medium heat under a lid for about 5 minutes.
5. Sprinkle with chopped herbs before serving.
Beef on the bone (500g), cabbage (300g), potatoes (3 pcs), beetroot (1 pc), carrot (1 pc), onion (1 pc), tomato paste (2 tbsp), lemon juice (1 tsp).

1. Boil beef broth (cook for 1.5–2 hours, removing foam).
2. Dice potatoes and add to the broth.
3. Grate the beetroot and sauté with lemon juice and tomato paste (to keep the red color).
4. Make a stir-fry with onions and carrots.
5. Add shredded cabbage to the pot, then after 10 minutes add the beetroot and stir-fry.
6. Season with salt and let it rest for 20 minutes.
Spaghetti (200g), bacon or pancetta (100g), egg yolks (3 pcs), Parmesan cheese (50g), ground black pepper, garlic (1 clove).

1. Boil spaghetti in salted water until al dente.
2. Fry garlic and bacon in a pan until golden. Remove the garlic.
3. In a bowl, mix yolks with grated cheese and plenty of pepper.
4. Transfer hot pasta to the pan with bacon, turn off the heat.
5. Quickly pour in the egg mixture, stirring constantly. The heat from the pasta will create a creamy sauce.
